allow: Bash("/c/Program Files/Oracle/VirtualBox/VBoxManage.exe" showvminfo "LG webOS TV Emulator 6.0.0")

Bash(ssh -i "$USERPROFILE/.ssh/webos_emul" -p 6622 -o ConnectTimeout=15 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o HostKeyAlgorithms=ssh-rsa -o PubkeyAcceptedKeyTypes=ssh-rsa developer@127.0.0.1 "echo SSH_OK")

Bash(ssh -v -i "$USERPROFILE/.ssh/webos_emul" -p 6622 -o ConnectTimeout=10 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o HostKeyAlgorithms=ssh-rsa -o PubkeyAcceptedKeyTypes=ssh-rsa developer@127.0.0.1 "echo OK")
